title: O anthropos pou gyrise apo ta piata!
original_title: Ο Άνθρωπος που Γύρισε από τα Πιάτα!
overview: A Greek-American started from low washing dishes, became a landlord dozens restaurants in America. One day, he decides to return to Greece to marry, but things will be confused when they get into the wrong house ...

trailers.title: O anthropos pou gyrise ap ta piata (Ο άνθρωπος που γύρισε απ' τα πιάτα) - Kostas Hatzihristos
